tooltipText.ocr: Search the contents of every document and not just the information that is indexed. If you enter two or more words, we’ll search for them as a phrase.
tooltipText.indexOnly: Search only the information that is indexed. If you enter two or more words, we’ll search for each word individually.

contentPanel.markdown:
# Disclaimer

 In accordance with state law, information has been redacted from certain instruments in the database; and the online database does not constitute the official repository of real property records and may not reflect the complete or unaltered contents of those records as maintained in the official real property records.

This Web Site is owned, operated, and managed by a third-party service provider (the “Hosted Solution Provider”).  All data, documents, materials, and other information (collectively, the “Information”) submitted by you in connection with this Web Site is received, stored, managed, scanned, maintained, and made accessible to users such as yourself by the Hosted Solution Provider and not the County.
COUNTY has tried to ensure that the Information contained in and retrieved from this Web Site  is accurate. Information is available on an “AS-IS” and “AS-AVAILABLE” basis.

COUNTY does not represent, warrant, or endorse the accuracy or reliability of any of the Information accessed from any of the services contained in this Web Site (the ‘Service’). The COUNTY does not make any representation as to the accuracy, reliability, copyright compliance, legality or completeness of the Information or Service. COUNTY shall not be liable for errors  in the Information contained in or retrieved from this Website or for any damages in connection with the use of such Information. Assessing or determining the completeness, accuracy, and reliability of the Information retrieved is the sole responsibility of the user.

COUNTY EXPRESSLY DISCLAIMS ANY AND ALL WARRANTIES, EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING, WITHOUT LIMITATION, WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY AND FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE, WITH RESPECT TO THE SERVICE AND INFORMATION. COUNTY DOES NOT WARRANT THAT USE OF THIS SERVICE WILL BE UNINTERRUPTED OR ERROR FREE AND DOES NOT GUARANTEE AGAINST DETECTION OR SPREAD OF ANY COMPUTER VIRUSES OR OTHER DAMAGING SOFTWARE, HARDWARE, NETWORKING, HOSTED SOLUTION, OR COMPUTER-RELATED APPLICATIONS, TECHNOLOGIES, EITHER NOW OR IN THE FUTURE.

COUNTY assumes no liability for failure to provide any property owner, title company, legal counsel, or other interested person or entity with requested notice of recorded Information.  The COUNTY, its officers, and employees assume no liability for fulfilling their legal duty to record documents, even if those documents are in some instances later determined to be erroneous, fraudulent, or invalid.
By signing up for the Service, you acknowledge that you have read and agree to the above disclaimer.
